title: Crispy Indian Onion Stir-Fry
description: A savory and crisp one-pot Vietnamese dish featuring garam masala, rich in flavor without added sugar.
instructions: Chop the onion, garlic cloves into small pieces and green chili peppers finely.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and fry until golden brown.
Add garlic, turmeric powder, and garam masala to the pan. Stir well for about 30 seconds.
Include sliced green chili peppers and continue cooking until they turn slightly translucent.
Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over the mixture in the pan. Stir gently to combine.
Stir in fresh cilantro leaves and mix everything together for another minute or two, ensuring all ingredients are coated with spices and oil.
Remove from heat immediately after adding cilantro.
